spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 pb-24
spacing_and_layout.card: p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm

components.button: rounded-full py-3 px-6 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center
components.input: w-full rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 p-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF4D6D]/20 focus:border-[#FF4D6D] focus:bg-white transition-colors
components.status_badge: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider flex w-fit items-center gap-1.5
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-gray-100 p-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50
components.header: sticky top-0 bg-[#FAFAFA]/90 backdrop-blur-md z-40 py-4 mb-4

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first, lightweight PWA-style interface optimized for max-w-md layout.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and customized Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dialogs for forms, Select for discounts).
App flow should consist of: Months view -> Orders in Month view -> Order Details (Notes/Clients) -> Client Note Detail (Abonos).
Ensure the 'data-testid' attributes are attached to buttons, links, form inputs, and key informational elements.
Calculations to implement: Client Note Discount = Total * (1 - Discount/100). Order Profit = Sum of all Notes - Order Cost. Paid Status = Total Paid >= Final Total.
Implement the 'SHEIN' fashion reseller vibe: Use the primary Coral color (#FF4D6D) sparingly for primary CTAs and active states, rely on abundant white space and rounded-2xl cards.
For the header gradient, since image generation failed, use a CSS gradient class: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-50 via-purple-50 to-white' for soft, aesthetic top headers.
Load dummy data prefilled for at least 2 months, 3 orders, and several clients with abonos to demonstrate functionality instantly.
